overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a medieval wooden marketplace pavilion with heavy timber framing. Characters in wizard-style robes walk and gather among wooden tables and benches, while natural sunlight filters through the open-sided structure revealing a lush green hillside in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval wooden marketplace pavilion with gathering tables

events.description: character in red-trimmed robes enters from the right side and moves toward the center tables
character walks through the left-side opening from the green hillside into the pavilion
group of characters near the right-side tables shifts positions and one exits toward the staircase

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the pavilion interior, watching NPCs move between tables and traverse the open walkway

notable_agents.action: character in dark robes with red accents walking from right entrance toward the central gathering area
character entering from the outdoor hillside area through the left-side opening of the pavilion

entered.detail: heavy wooden support beams and trusses forming the open-air structure with Gothic architectural details
long wooden tables with benches arranged for gathering and dining
grey stone tile flooring covering the pavilion ground
lush grassy landscape visible through the open archways of the pavilion
steep wooden stairs leading to an upper level on the right side of the structure
metal and glass lanterns suspended from the timber roof beams

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a medieval wooden marketplace pavilion bathed in natural daylight. Characters in wizard-style robes move through the space, entering from the green hillside visible through the open sides and gathering around the central wooden tables. The heavy timber framing and stone flooring create a rustic atmosphere while NPCs walk, socialize, and traverse the area beneath hanging lanterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static cinematic view of a medieval marketplace pavilion where the rustic interior blends seamlessly with the natural landscape outside. It begins with a wide perspective of the heavy timber framing and stone flooring, bathed in soft, natural daylight. As the scene unfolds, characters in wizard-style robes emerge from the lush green hillside visible through the open sides, moving deeper into the structure. The camera captures these figures as they socialize and traverse the space, eventually gathering around the central wooden tables beneath hanging lanterns.
